description.value:
A compact, well-balanced blade suited to close quarters and ambush fighting. Mastered, the shortsword's balance becomes an active combat tool â€” advantage lets the weapon truly shine.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d4, Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d6, Balanced
MasterOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d6, Balanced â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkThe Balanced property now also applies to attackers targeting you. When you have advantage on an attack roll, roll your damage dice and Balanced dice twice and use the better result.

rmeData.masterPerk: The Balanced property now also applies to attackers targeting you. When you have advantage on an attack roll, roll your damage dice and Balanced dice twice and use the better result.
